case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. JOSE EMMANUEL OSEAS RONQUILLO VICENTE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE: FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VICENTE, JOSE EMMANUEL OSEAS RONQUILLO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IN IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JOSE EMMANUEL OSEAS RONQUILLO VICENTE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VICENTE, JOSE EMMANUEL OSEAS RONQUILLO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VICENTE, JOSE EMMANUEL OSEAS RONQUILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $125.00) SERVED AUG-08-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VICENTE, JOSE EMMANUEL OSEAS RONQUILLO
